channel.title: Pages on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on yexca'Blog

item.title: Support
item.description: If you find something here helpful, consider buying me a coffee ☕ to support my work. Thanks for keeping this little blog alive! Buy me a Coffee @yexca AFDIAN @yexca

item.title: About
item.description: BLOG ID Name yexca Pronunciation /jɛkɑ/ Description This is yexca's personal blog: code, notes, systems, and the small pieces of life turned into structures I can understand. current focus Tech tinkering Hugo / Docker / AI / LaTeX Life architecture Cognitive matrix / life investment / energy and strength Creation and virtual worlds Music / AI covers / VRChat / game design notes no, possible
